---
name: "🐞 Bug Report"
about: Report a bug to help us improve MinterMC
title: "[BUG] <Short description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

- [ ] Make sure your issue is not a duplicate of an existing [issue](https://github.com/Valcyle/MinterMC/issues).

## 🛑 Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🛠 To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Execute command '...'
3. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## 💻 Environment Information
- **MinterMC Version:** (e.g., v0.1.0-alpha)
- **Java Version:** (Should be 25)
- **Minecraft Edition:** [ ] Java Edition [ ] Bedrock Edition
- **Minecraft Server Version:** (e.g., 1.21.4)
- **Adapter Used:** (e.g., mintermc-adapter-java)
- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., stack traces, logs, or screenshots).
